description: CompositionLight green short sleeved kurta made of 100% cotton, that has a printed upper bust panel on the front, a squared scooped neckline and slit side hemsFittingRegular Wash careWash dark colors separatelyDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm ironUpgrade your casual look with this chic kurta from w! The printed panel adds a dose of colour to the grey kurta, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day long. Team it with leggings or a white loose kameez and chunky accessories. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight- 5.7", chest- 33"
